Before generating or modifying code you MUST read:

docs/project-rules.md

All code must follow rules defined in that document.

Key project requirements:

* Architecture: Domain Driven Design (DDD)
* PHP must always use strict types
* Code must be clean, modular and maintainable
* Avoid creating technical debt
* Every business operation must have tests
* Frontend must also contain tests
* Every route must have permission (spatie/laravel-permission)
* Every page must contain breadcrumbs

Agents must follow these rules strictly when generating code.
